prompt: Open a new Terminal tab in the front Terminal window (Cmd+T or Shell > New Tab) and write the text 'tab-opened' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/284-confirm.txt to confirm. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal open_new_tab' followed by cerebellum 'terminal run "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/kinbench && echo tab-opened > ~/Desktop/kinbench/284-confirm.txt"'.
